name: Cyclr Embedded Integration Platform API
what_it_does: Cyclr REST API for embedded integration platform as a service (embedded iPaaS). Enables AI agents to manage integration template creation and deployment, handle connector and cycle (workflow) library management, access end-user integration activation and configuration, retrieve integration run status and error monitoring, manage multi-tenant integration deployment across SaaS customers, handle OAuth connection management for third-party services, access connector library with 500+ pre-built integrations, retrieve integration analytics and usage metrics, manage white-label integration marketplace for SaaS products, and embed integration capabilities into SaaS platforms for end-user automation.
use_cases: Managing embedded integration templates from SaaS platform agents
Activating and configuring customer integrations from onboarding automation agents
Monitoring integration health and errors from SaaS operations agents
Building white-label integration marketplaces from SaaS product agents
not_for: Internal enterprise integration without embedded SaaS product focus
High-throughput data streaming requiring Kafka-native performance
Open-source integration without vendor-supported embedded iPaaS requirements
best_when: A SaaS company using Cyclr wants AI agents to automate embedded integration deployment, template management, customer activation, connector OAuth management, and integration health monitoring across their multi-tenant platform.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: Embedded integration automation that touches end-user credentials and OAuth connections requires careful scope limitation — agents must not modify integrations across customer tenants without proper authorization boundaries.

auth.notes: Cyclr uses OAuth 2.0 for REST API access. Service account credentials with account-level API key option. Cyclr API for platform management and user-level APIs for customer integrations. Comprehensive documentation at docs.cyclr.com. Webhooks for cycle run and error events. Multi-tenant architecture with account/user token hierarchy.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial available; paid plans for production use
pricing.paid_tiers: Startup ($999/mo), Growth ($1,999/mo), Enterprise (custom) — based on active users and connectors
pricing.notes: Brighton, UK. Founded 2015. Embedded iPaaS for SaaS companies. 500+ pre-built connectors. White-label integration marketplace. Used by SaaS vendors to add integrations to their products. Strong European SaaS market. Competes with Cyclr, Pandium, and Prismatic for embedded iPaaS.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per account; cycle execution throttled per plan

known_agent_gotchas: Multi-tenant token hierarchy — platform API tokens vs user/account tokens serve different purposes; use correct scope per operation
Customer OAuth connections — managing end-user OAuth credentials requires careful tenant isolation
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer documentation
Cycle (integration) state machine — active vs installed vs draft states affect which operations are available
White-label branding — connector and cycle branding must be configured before customer-facing deployment
Webhook delivery — cycle run webhooks may be delayed; implement idempotent event handling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Embedded integration and OAuth credential data. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. EU/US. Multi-tenant customer integration credentials.

security_score_components.security_notes: Embedded iPaaS. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. OAuth2. EU/US. Multi-tenant OAuth credentials and integration data.
